_comment: Mapping between Septuagint (LXX) and Masoretic Text (MT) numbering. Each row maps an LXX coordinate to its MT equivalent (or vice-versa). Used by the Berea app to resolve cross-translation references when source uses one system and target uses the other.

psalms.note: LXX Psalm 146 = first half of MT Psalm 147.
LXX Psalm 147 = second half of MT Psalm 147.
LXX-only psalm. Distributed in canon_extendido as ps2.

additions.note: Esther additions A-F (esg) are placed inline in LXX Esther; MT has only the 10 chapters of est.
Susanna (LXX): chapter 13 in some Daniel editions, separate book in others. Distributed as separate book_id `sus` per canon_extendido.
Bel and the Dragon (LXX): chapter 14 in some Daniel editions. Distributed as `bel`.
Prayer of Azariah and Song of the Three Young Men (LXX Daniel 3:24-90). Distributed as `s3y`.
